Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Plaintiff'S Shoes For Inspection And Destructive Testing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel production, inspection, and destructive testing is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, as amended by AB 3078, Chapter 171, Statutes of 2004, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. As this motion was filed on April 7, 2005, the new provisions apply. The first day this motion could be noticed for is April 29, 2005. In addition, the motion does not set forth facts showing a reasonable and good faith attempt at an informal resolution of the issue of destructive testing. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
